title: demo and packaging proven
summary: Added a demo command and human-readable summary report, then verified the installed bnt console script end to end so the package now has a stronger public demo and packaging proof path.
completed: Added a demo CLI command that reuses the sample fixture and writes all outputs
Updated docs to prefer verifying the installed console entry point when the public CLI changes
Added a console-script smoke test using bnt demo
Recorded a per-slice verification artifact for the demo/packaging slice
decisions_locked: The installed bnt command is now the preferred verification path for public CLI changes
The toolkit should produce both machine outputs and a compact human-readable summary for demo flows
Packaging proof at this stage means editable local installation plus working console entry point
open_questions: Whether release readiness should require wheel or sdist install verification in addition to editable install
How broad the next fixture expansion should be before a v0 release decision
Whether the demo should eventually include a richer html or terminal report format
next_steps: Expand fixture and biomarker coverage for broader confidence
Add wheel or sdist packaging verification if required for release readiness
resume_from: Start from project_memory/current_context.md, then move into the 100% release-readiness decision with fixture expansion and packaging-bar decisions.
